creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: kuriyama
Date: Sun Mar  3 11:51:05 2013
New Revision: 313343
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313343

Log:
  - Upgrade to 3.1.6.
  - Add --with-openssl knob.
  
  PR:		ports/175886
  Submitted by:	gor <gor@bss.org.ua>

Modified:
  head/databases/pgpool-II/Makefile
  head/databases/pgpool-II/distinfo
  head/databases/pgpool-II/pkg-descr

Modified: head/databases/pgpool-II/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/pgpool-II/Makefile	Sun Mar  3 11:21:26 2013	(r313342)
+++ head/databases/pgpool-II/Makefile	Sun Mar  3 11:51:05 2013	(r313343)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pgpool-II
-PORTVERSION=	3.1.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.1.6
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	LOCAL/kuriyama \
 		http://www.pgpool.net/mediawiki/images/
@@ -20,6 +20,8 @@ USE_GMAKE=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_PGSQL=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+USE_OPENSSL=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-openssl
 
 CONFLICTS=	pgpool-3.* pgpool-II-2.* pgpool-II-3.0.*
 USE_RC_SUBR=	pgpool
@@ -31,6 +33,16 @@ PORTDOCShtml+=	tutorial-en.html tutorial
 
 MAN8=		pgpool.8
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE+=SSL
+SSL_DESC=	Build with OpenSSL support
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSSL}
+USE_OPENSSL=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-openssl
+.endif
+
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 .if exists(${LOCALBASE}/include/postgresql/server/replication/walreceiver.h)

Modified: head/databases/pgpool-II/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/pgpool-II/distinfo	Sun Mar  3 11:21:26 2013	(r313342)
+++ head/databases/pgpool-II/distinfo	Sun Mar  3 11:51:05 2013	(r313343)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (pgpool-II-3.1.3.tar.gz) = e4eb9dd809a4b8f3962769558ecea524908edfed5816b7120b448f4eafd82249
-SIZE (pgpool-II-3.1.3.tar.gz) = 1402843
+SHA256 (pgpool-II-3.1.6.tar.gz) = c15783105eecc85eb3cadebc22e0d6c9efa916da4bcc4c96c12b0463b34945cc
+SIZE (pgpool-II-3.1.6.tar.gz) = 1353846

Modified: head/databases/pgpool-II/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/pgpool-II/pkg-descr	Sun Mar  3 11:21:26 2013	(r313342)
+++ head/databases/pgpool-II/pkg-descr	Sun Mar  3 11:51:05 2013	(r313343)
@@ -7,4 +7,4 @@ as pgpool-I by changing configuration pa
 executed in pgpool-I mode enables multiple DB nodes to be connected,
 which was not possible in pgpool-I.
 
-WWW:	http://pgpool.projects.postgresql.org/
+WWW:	http://www.pgpool.net/
